headings: UNCONDITIONAL WAIVER AND RELEASE OF LIEN UPON FINAL PAYMENT
text: The undersigned being duly sworn, states that (s)he is an authorized agent for ('Supplier'). Pursuant to its Supply Agreement with ('Subcontractor'), a subcontractor to GSC Construction Mountain, LLC ('Contractor'), and in consideration of the final payment in the amount of $ , Supplier hereby waives and releases its lien and right to claim a lien for labor, services, or materials furnished to ('Subcontractor') for incorporation into GSC Birchway Commerce City (the 'Project') owned by GS Commerce City Apt Owner, LLC ('Owner') being constructed on the following real property (the 'Property'):
